Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Production Of Documents And Responses To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-04-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
J. Niley Dorit, Esq., for Leslie Mullin, Plaintiff/Moving Party
Sasha M. Cummings, Esq., for Olympic View Realty and Carmel Partners, Inc., Defendant and Opposing Party.

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Leslie Miullin's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents And Responses To Interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part. The responses must be supplemented to conform with the requirements of the Code of Civil Procedure as the responses must indicate that a reasonable and good faith effort to obtain the information by inquiry to other natural persons or organizations has taken place. The responses must indicate whether there is any information that has been obtained through that process and must set forth that information and indicate from whom any further information may be obtained. Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
